html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge

Salt Ponds are naturally spawning objects exclusive to The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together. Three of them are found in the city ruins area of the map. Fishing in a Salt Pond using a Fishing Rod will yield Salmon, while installing a Salt Rack allows for the gathering of Salt Crystals. It takes 2.5 minutes to grow Salt Crystals on a Salt Rack. Once a Salt Rack has been installed over a Salt Pond, it cannot be removed and the Pond can no longer be used for fishing.

Gallery

  • A Salt Pond with a Salt Rack installed that is ready to be harvested.

–Wurt

–Walter
“A little salty spring.”
–Wanda
